message:
fix(scheduler,database): lock-ordering hazard in three_lane waker + postgres binary parsing

three_lane.rs: Restructure ThreeLaneLocalWaker::schedule() to avoid
holding both local_ready and local locks simultaneously. Cancel path
now acquires only the local lock; ready path acquires only local_ready.

postgres.rs: Fix BOOL binary parsing (empty buffer silently returned
false, any non-zero byte should be true), tighten INT/FLOAT binary
length checks from >= to == with explicit error arms, and add DataRow
column count validation against RowDescription to prevent panics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
